heading: Oath of President of Senate
label: 22 Oath of President of Senate
text: When a President of the Senate has not taken the oath of office, it shall be administered to him by any Member of the Senate.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 29 derived from , .act June 1, 1789, ch. 1, § 21 Stat. 23
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 29 derived from , .act June 1, 1789, ch. 1, § 21 Stat. 23
